title: platanus occidentalis var. hispanica
intro: Platanus occidentalis var. hispanica, also known as Western Sycamore or American Planetree, is a variety of the Western Sycamore tree native to the eastern and central regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from the bark and leaves. The health benefits of Platanus occidentalis var. hispanica include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by steeping the bark and leaves in hot water, and can be used as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to leverage its medicinal properties.
